data.title: Batch remediation: fix all direct path violations in instruction files
data.description:
Fix all ~152 direct path violations across ~48 instruction files in plugins/dso/ (SC5).

## Approach
1. Run check-shim-refs.sh with no args to get full violation list
2. For each violation, evaluate and apply the correct fix:
   - Executable script reference -> convert to .claude/scripts/dso <script-name>
   - Bootstrap/install doc (INSTALL.md, dso-setup refs) -> annotate with # shim-exempt: bootstrap context
   - Hook/lib source already exempt -> verify exclusion works (no action needed)
3. Re-run check-shim-refs.sh to confirm 0 violations

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — mechanical path replacement with no conditional logic (unit exemption criterion #2: change-detector). Each change is a string substitution from direct path to shim equivalent.

## Size Warning
If diff exceeds 600 lines, split into: 3a (skill files) and 3b (agents, prompts, workflows, docs).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] check-shim-refs.sh reports 0 violations
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh; test \$? -eq 0
- [ ] No plugins/dso/scripts/ literals in skill SKILL.md files (except exempted)
  Verify: grep -r "plugins/dso/scripts/" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/ --include="*.md" | grep -v "shim-exempt" | grep -v "check-shim-refs" | wc -l | awk '{exit (\$1 > 0)}'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
